concerns: Vite default warn exceeded (>500 KB gzip-bound assets)
No React.lazy on parent-only or settings screens
20 console.* statements survive in production bundle (no esbuild.drop)

no_pagination: src/lib/sync.js:217 fetchEvents — no .range(), no date filter; unbounded by family age

notes: All 9 setInterval call sites cleaned up.
All 30 addEventListener call sites paired with removeEventListener.
Set-accumulator refs (firedNotifs, firedExactStatuses, arrivedSet, departedAlerts, academyFocusAlertedRef) grow over a session; bounded by event count but no day-rollover prune. P3.
No navigator.onLine / @capacitor/network listener anywhere in src/.
Optimistic update + rollback present for events (insert/edit/delete) and voice events.
Failed mutation surfaces a toast and rolls back state; user must retry manually.
Service worker (public/sw.js) handles Web Push only; no fetch-event offline cache.

issues.description: CHANNEL_ERROR -> SUBSCRIBED reconnect does not trigger a re-fetch; polling fallback covers only 3 of 9 tables. Stale data on reconnect.
fetchEvents has no .range() / date filter — unbounded JSON payload over years.
No online detection, no mutation queue; failed insert rolls back and asks user to retry manually.
Confirms Agent 04 P2 — active conversations stale if realtime degraded.
1.22 MB / 365 KB gzip; no manualChunks; no React.lazy.
No Sentry / equivalent. Production crashes invisible.
src/main.jsx:38-41 shows full stack to end users.
8,198 lines; whole-tree re-renders on every state change.
Object.values(events).flat().find(...) on every render at App.jsx:7725.
firedNotifs/firedExactStatuses/etc grow per session, no day-rollover prune.
No preconnect for Supabase / Kakao; no Pretendard preload.

blocking_reasons: AGENT11-P1-001: realtime missed-event recovery gap (no re-fetch on reconnect; 6 of 9 tables have no polling fallback)
AGENT11-P1-002: fetchEvents unbounded payload (no date pagination)
AGENT11-P1-003: no offline detection nor mutation queue (kid commute / subway scenario)
AGENT11-P1-004: memo_replies polling fallback missing (active conversations break on realtime drop)
